question: The Casimir effect demonstrates
options: A quantum vacuum force between two uncharged plates placed very close together
Miniature organ-like structures grown from stem cells used to study disease and test treatments
CO₂ dissolving in seawater forms carbonic acid, lowering ocean pH and threatening marine life
See through dust clouds and observe the universe's earliest galaxies formed after the Big Bang
answer: A quantum vacuum force between two uncharged plates placed very close together

question: Xenotransplantation involves
options: Supervised uses labelled data; unsupervised finds patterns in unlabelled data

answer: Transplanting organs from genetically modified animals (typically pigs) into humans
